tagged_story_for_tts:
Now I will teach you good_and_bad.<[silence:60ms]>

Good is like warm sun on skin—makes belly full, tribe strong, fire burn bright.<[silence:60ms]> Like sweet berry in mouth, sharp spear in hand, safe cave when storm howls.<[silence:60ms]> Body feels light, breath comes easy.<[silence:60ms]>

Bad is like rotten meat—makes gut twist, teeth ache, fire die.<[silence:60ms]> Like thorn in foot, wolf near child, cold wind stealing heat.<[silence:60ms]> Body feels heavy, breath turns hard.<[silence:60ms]>

If thing helps tribe live, it good.<[silence:60ms]> If thing hurts tribe, it bad.<[silence:60ms]> That is all.<[silence:60ms]>
clean_story:
Now I will teach you good_and_bad.

Good is like warm sun on skin—makes belly full, tribe strong, fire burn bright. Like sweet berry in mouth, sharp spear in hand, safe cave when storm howls. Body feels light, breath comes easy.

Bad is like rotten meat—makes gut twist, teeth ache, fire die. Like thorn in foot, wolf near child, cold wind stealing heat. Body feels heavy, breath turns hard.

If thing helps tribe live, it good. If thing hurts tribe, it bad. That is all.
